case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT VS. CASSANDRA COLLINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, CASSANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 6TH STREET, #416 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72032251)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, CASSANDRA

EX PARTE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCO SEC 415.45 (TRANSACTION ID # 71820875) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
